det_check_template:
proof fn det_get_region_sizes(pm_regions: PMRegions, r1: Vec<
    u64,
>, r2: Vec<
    u64,
>)
    requires (pm_regions.inv()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (r1@.len() == pm_regions@.len())
            &&& (forall|i: int| 0 <= i < pm_regions@.len() ==> r1@[i] == #[trigger] pm_regions@[i].len())
            &&& (r2@.len() == pm_regions@.len())
            &&& (forall|i: int| 0 <= i < pm_regions@.len() ==> r2@[i] == #[trigger] pm_regions@[i].len())
        }) ==> det_get_region_sizes_equal(r1, r2),
{
{ASSUMES}}
